# Static App Notes

This application is intentionally simple:

- No backend.
- No package manager.
- No build process.
- No database.
- No external scripts.

The app loads `data/recipes.js`, which sets `window.RECIPES`. This avoids browser security issues that can happen when using `fetch()` from a local file path.

To publish it, upload the full folder to any static host. Keep the folder structure intact.

## Downloads Generated by the App

- Markdown plan for sending to the SPL.
- CSV shopping list.
- JSON plan for saving or reloading later.

## Suggested Future Improvements

- Add verified full ingredients and directions for every recipe.
- Add cost estimates.
- Add dietary filters.
- Add patrol assignments and duty roster.
- Add reusable campout templates.
